chunks.title: Law of the Guilt Offering for Deceit
chunks.reason: A complete legal unit detailing restitution and sacrifice for specific sins against God and neighbor.

chunks.title: Law of the Burnt Offering
chunks.reason: A distinct legal section instructing priests on the maintenance and ritual of the burnt offering.

chunks.title: Law of the Grain Offering
chunks.reason: A complete legal unit covering the preparation, consumption, and holiness of the grain offering.

chunks.title: Law of the Priest's Grain Offering
chunks.reason: A specific legal instruction regarding the daily offering brought by the anointed priest.

chunks.title: Law of the Sin Offering
chunks.reason: A comprehensive legal section detailing the slaughter, consumption, and disposal of the sin offering.
